# `library_codex.graph.GraphOrdering`

木制約最適順序・st-numbering・全辺replacement shortest path。

- 計算量の目安: $O(N\log N)$ / $O(N+M)$ / $O((N+M)\log N)$
- source: [`graph/GraphOrdering.py`](../../../graph/GraphOrdering.py)
- 公開API: function 3、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.graph.GraphOrdering import optimal_tree_topological_order, bipolar_orientation, shortest_path_without_each_edge
```
